_comment: Recall floors for `osaurus-evals run --fail-on-floor`. Keys are case `id` strings — must match the fixture id exactly. `minMatches` is the per-lane recall floor (the gate now sums matched names across the tools/methods/skills lanes, so method/skill cases are guarded, not just tools); a case's `maxAccepted` (read from its fixture) is also enforced for any floored case that declares one. The flag is OPT-IN and not yet wired into CI. Cases intentionally OMITTED as tracking-only: (1) `capability_search.shell-execution` — `sandbox_exec` is excluded from the index by design (ToolIndexService.syncFromRegistry runtimeManagedToolNames); (2) `capability_search.abstain-greeting` and `capability_search.method-abstain` — their accepted tool noise (`complete` 0.355, `clarify` 0.339, `notify` 0.308) is conversational meta-tooling whose embed cosine OVERLAPS real recall (`browser_scroll` 0.298, `plot_data` 0.281). The 2026-06-19 sweep (Config/capability-search-sweep.md) proves the only embed-cosine floor that zeroes them (0.40) breaks `browser-prefix` recall, so they stay tracking-only pending the query-intent / pre-RRF abstain mechanism — NOT a higher cosine floor; (3) `capability_search.skill-paraphrase` — `Content Summarizer` never reaches the embedder's top hits for 'give me the gist' (recall/description gap), addressed by the description-audit follow-up. PROMOTED 2026-06-19: `capability_search.skill-abstain` now enforces `maxAccepted=0` — the tools-lane embed-cosine gate (`minimumEmbedCosineForTools=0.25`) drops its lone accepted noise hit (`complete`, cosine 0.110, BM25-only), verified by the sweep. The method/skill recall floors below were calibrated by the PR-A baseline against the per-lane embed-cosine cutoffs `minimumRelevanceScoreMethods` = `…Skills` = 0.25; the tools recall floors hold under the new tools-lane gate (0.25 < min recall cosine 0.298).
